title: (Bearish Signal) DAVA, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on June 08, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that DAVA's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 26 similar cases where DAVA's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 21 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 81%. Current price $102.96 crossed the resistance line at $87.97 and is trading between $105.81 resistance and $87.97 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 05/06/21 - 06/08/21, the price experienced a +13% Uptrend, while the week of 06/01/21 - 06/08/21 shows a -1% Downtrend. 

https://preview.redd.it/k76zogm6i9471.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=d9e1c68540fd68dfc186c4623eb1dd8c90e202d0

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for DAVA moved out of overbought territory on June 08, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 26 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 21 of the 26 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 81%.

The Stochastic Indicator demonstrated that the ticker has stayed in the overbought zone for 11 days. The longer the ticker stays in the overbought zone, the sooner a price pull-back is expected.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where DAVA declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 72%.

DAVA broke above its upper Bollinger Band on May 25, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/11679352-endava-plc-adr-dava-102-17-rsi-indicator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-june-08-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
